title: LoginExpansion
description: A somewhat handy login expansion plugin
body:

## 1. Introduction

> LoginExpansion — A somewhat handy login expansion plugin

1. Automatically reminds online players to welcome a new player upon their first login
2. Players who send a welcome message can receive a random amount of coins within a customizable range
3. Click the chat message to send a welcome with one click
4. The welcome message content can be customized

![LoginExpansion](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/LoginExpansion/1.webp)

## 2. Dependencies

Vault **Required**  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/34315)

**Choose one of the following login plugins**

AuthMe  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/6269/)

CatSeedLogin  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/116891/)
